title: ScrollButtons
text: ScrollButtons Images to use for the left and right scroll buttons. " ScrollButtons = ImageList " Value Description List Comma-separated list of two image or glyph names; for example: @ LeftImageFile , @ RightImageFile ^ LeftGlyphName , ^ RightGlyphName If only one image is specified, the property is ignored. Usage Dynamic? Yes Supported in Grid? No Dependencies: Only works for a single-line, horizontal tab strip Description This property only works for a single-line, horizontal tab strip, and if a Default Image is defined. If two images are defined, they are positioned to the left and the right of the tab strip. The size is determined by the height of the tab strip. The width of the buttons are determined by the image width. If no ScrollButtons are defined, default scroll buttons are displayed in the default Windows representation and location (both buttons appear in the right-hand corner of the scroll bar). Using in ProcScript You can use $properties or $fieldproperties to set or get the property and its value. For more information, see $properties and $fieldproperties . $fieldproperties(FLD) = "scrollbuttons=@left.png,@right.png" Copy Applies To utabex (TabEx) Related Links Default Image (ImgDefault) The image that is displayed as the button or tab.
